overall.description: First-person exploration of a dimly lit Arasaka corporate warehouse facility from Cyberpunk 2077. The player moves through a narrow maintenance corridor with red-lit observation windows into a bright storage bay, approaching a large blast door labeled IC1.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow maintenance corridor with red-lit observation window

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through the dark corridor toward the red-lit observation window

entered.detail: rectangular table covered with gray tarp with a white disposable cup on top
large reinforced window revealing interior chamber bathed in red neon light
tall industrial storage containers stacked against the right wall
perforated metal flooring with red safety accent strips along the edges

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit industrial corridor with a covered table immediately visible. The camera moves forward past stacked containers toward a large window glowing with red light, suggesting an adjacent chamber. The environment features exposed industrial piping and metal grate flooring.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor with fluorescent and skylight illumination

events.description: passing the red-lit window, ambient illumination shifts from dark red to cool white fluorescent light
entering the main storage bay with bright overhead skylight panels and covered equipment

agents.ego_description: continuing forward while slightly turning left, passing the red-lit chamber and entering the brighter storage area

entered.detail: long industrial fluorescent light fixture mounted on the ceiling
office furniture covered with white protective tarps
circular corporate logo with three-leaf clover design on the left wall
large industrial blast door with IC1 designation and ARASAKA signage above
large rectangular ceiling panel emitting intense white artificial light
raised platform with large equipment covered in gray tarps

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the red-lit window into a transitional space where cool fluorescent lights illuminate covered office furniture. The Arasaka corporate logo becomes visible on the left wall as the environment opens into a larger storage bay with bright overhead panels. The IC1 blast door becomes visible at the far end of the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: bright storage bay with corporate branding and blast door

events.description: slowing slightly as approaching the IC1 blast door at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking down the center aisle toward the large IC1 blast door, flanked by covered equipment on both sides

entered.detail: matching circular corporate logo on the right wall, symmetrical to the left side

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through the brightly lit storage bay with intense overhead skylight panels. The camera approaches the IC1 blast door as matching Arasaka logos appear on both walls. Covered equipment lines both sides of the metal grate walkway as the door details become clearly visible in the center of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial corridor that gradually opens into a brightly illuminated corporate storage bay. It begins by moving past a covered table and stacked containers along a metal grate floor, heading toward a window glowing with an ominous red light. As the camera passes this window, the atmosphere shifts from dim shadows to cool fluorescent lighting, revealing covered office furniture and an Arasaka corporate logo on the wall. The scene then expands into a wide storage bay under intense overhead skylight panels, where the camera glides along a walkway lined with covered equipment. Finally, the movement culminates as the camera approaches a large blast door labeled IC1, flanked by matching corporate logos on both walls.
